title: Change imagedir from default ,  container failed to start with --uidmap option
body:
### Issue Description

Changed the imagedir in the storage.conf file. Pull the image from registry , which will persist to the new imagedir location. while running the container with --uidmap it failed to come up. Below is the error. 

![image](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/42213531/db645223-98bf-412a-9638-907a8f20774c)

 podman run -it --uidmap 0:1000:65523 ubi8 /bin/sh
Error: crun: open `/root/image/overlay/bd2a18a9dfe9781372bdf1b1e5022e2cc6bb463bc4926cd66595281848a67950/merged/run/.containerenv`: No such file or directory: OCI runtime attempted to invoke a command that was not found


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Change the imagedir in storage.conf file
2. Podman system reset to apply the config
3. pull an image (ubi8)
4. run the container with --uidmap ( podman run -it --uidmap 0:1000:65523 ubi8 /bin/sh)


### Describe the results you received

Container failed to comeup 

### Describe the results you expected

Podman suppose to start the container with the new image location and uidmap
